# Keith Ratner — Portfolio Site

> This is the professional portfolio of Keith Ratner, an AI workflow strategist and creative operations leader. The site showcases AI-augmented creative operations work, UX/UI engineering, digital marketing leadership, and hands-on agentic workflow implementation. Keith is actively seeking senior roles in AI strategy, AI content operations, and creative operations management.

## About Keith

Decades of experience across graphic design, UX/UI engineering, front-end development, digital marketing, and creative leadership. Hands-on daily user of Claude, GitHub Copilot, generative AI video platforms (Kling, Veo, Sora), and agentic workflow tools. Former roles at Apple (contract), Price Waterhouse, and Director of Creative Services at a national healthcare company for nearly a decade.

Based in Staunton, Virginia. Open to senior remote and hybrid roles.

## What This Site Demonstrates

- AI workflow leadership and creative operations strategy
- React/TypeScript/Vite front-end engineering (this site is itself a deployed example)
- Agentic pipeline design and team AI enablement
- UX/UI design and digital product thinking

## Portfolio Sections

- [Hero / Overview](https://kratner.github.io/portfolio-site/): "Where AI Meets Creative Operations" — positioning and summary
- [AI Workflows](https://kratner.github.io/portfolio-site/#features): Core capabilities in AI-augmented creative operations
- [Services](https://kratner.github.io/portfolio-site/#services): AI content strategy, workflow automation, team enablement, and creative direction
- [Projects](https://kratner.github.io/portfolio-site/#portfolio): Selected work and case studies
- [Contact](https://kratner.github.io/portfolio-site/#contact): Outreach and availability

## Technical Stack (This Site)

React, TypeScript, Vite, SCSS, GitHub Pages, gh-pages deployment

## AI Tools — Daily Implementation

Claude (Anthropic), GitHub Copilot, VS Code, Kling, Veo, Sora, Adobe Creative Cloud
